case_title: BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. VS. STEVEN FITZGERALD et al

MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ANTHONY L. HEAD FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-26-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-13-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KAREN FARNSWORTH. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). TO PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS.
